---
title: "git_spoke.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\git_spoke.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.18
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.20
---

## Intent
The `git_spoke.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on GitSpoke, __init__, run_cmd, is_clean, ensure_branch, restore_branch, commit_changes. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via GitSpoke, __init__, run_cmd, is_clean, ensure_branch, restore_branch, commit_changes. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `GitSpoke`
- `__init__`
- `run_cmd`
- `is_clean`
- `ensure_branch`
- `restore_branch`
- `commit_changes`
